title: Finite Newton Step Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Newton-step bad coordinate QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Newton linear-solve replay computes next_x = 10/7 for a two-variable quadratic while the malformed row claims next_x = 3/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional Newton or second-order rows only when they add distinct Hessian solve, trust-region, line-search, conditioning, or theorem-reconstruction pressure; keep convergence, globalization, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite Newton-step witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay the fixed polynomial value, gradient, Hessian, positive-definite minors, Newton right-hand side, linear solve, next point, stationarity, and objective decrease.
Route false finite Newton-coordinate claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact coordinate.
Keep Newton convergence, globalization, trust-region methods, conditioning, and floating-point stability marked Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty until formal routes exist.
